title: Miaria Prrt
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Felacatian2.jpg]] |name=Miaria Prrt |homeworld=[[Felacat]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Felacatian]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Black and yellow |feathers= |eyes=Orange |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|When you fight for your freedom you should never hesitate, never retreat, ''never stop''!|Miaria Prrt, to [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]]|{{TCWComicCite|6.21|The Feral Queen}}}} '''Miaria Prrt''' was the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Felacatian]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] of [[Felacat]] and became [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Biography== ===Traveling with Villie=== {{Quote|You are ''princess'', you say?''"
"''Ye-es, Grahrk, I am. From planet ''Felacat''. My name is ''Miaria Prrt'' and I was kidnapped in deep space. But when ship come out from hyperspace, everyone else on board, they are ''dead''! Only I am alive!''"
"''Really? And why is that?''"
"''I am no know! ''Most'' distressful! Please. You take me to my father. He make it good for you.|[[Vilmarh Grahrk]] and Miaria Prrt|{{Tales|8|Bad Business}}}} The [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Felacatian]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] of [[Felacat]], Miaria Prrt was next in line to the throne of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of Felacat. Circa [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Prrt was kidnapped in [[Realspace/Legends|deep space]], but when the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the stress of the jump forced Prrt into [[Changeling/Legends|changing]] into the Felacatian's secondary form and she [[Death/Legends|killed]] the entire crew. The ship then arrived on the planet of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where Prrt located a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] and hired him to return her to her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Prrt was forthcoming with Grahrk and warned him that any severe stress—such as a prolonged hyperspace jump—would force her to change, and the trip would therefore be slow-going. Grahrk readily agreed, and after settling a debt with a local junk dealer named [[Watto/Legends|Watto]], who provided the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] with three [[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|pit droids]], the pair made their way offworld in Grahrk's ship, the [[Inferno (Vilmarh Grahrk)|''Inferno'']]. [[File:Felacatian1.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Prrt in her "animal form"]] After being in hyperspace for some time, Prrt began to suffer from headaches that prefaced the change. Grahrk attempted to revert to realspace, but found he was unable to. Unknown to Grahrk, the pit droids had faulty programming, and sought to constantly "fix" anything they could find, and had disabled the ship's [[hyperdrive brake]]s. While he went to investigate the cause of their problem, Prrt began to change. Though he found the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] disassembling the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]], the uncontrollable Prrt confronted and attacked him. Grahrk escaped into a nearby crawl chute, but was informed by the ship's [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|AI]], [[NT 600]], that the droids were now beginning to break down the vessel's core processor, which would leave them dead in space. Grahrk managed to shut down the droids while evading Prrt, and finally trapped the princess inside an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] until they arrived on Felacat. After landing, Prrt was returned to her people. Grahrk, angry over the trouble and damage she had caused, sought compensation from the planetary leaders. The [[King/Legends|king]] and his [[Security guard/Legends|guards]] then threatened to transform themselves, saying that Grahrk would be wise not to stress them. Once back aboard his ship, Grahrk began to smile. NT was curious as to how he could be happy, and Grahrk replied that he had left the malfunctioning pit droids planetside, with instructions to "fix the planet to death". And that made Vilmarh very happy indeed. ===The Clone Wars=== {{Quote|If that is how your people truly feel, why aren't they pouncing on these droids with their ''own'' claws?''"
"''Because when I took the throne ten years ago, I trained them to ''tame'' the beast within! I wanted the Felacatians to be ''sophisticated''; a peaceful addition to your Republic!|[[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]] and Miaria Prrt|}} [[File:Siege_of_Felacat.png|thumb|250px|The siege of the Royal Felacatian Palace]] By the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Prrt had become the [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of Felacat. Over the last ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]], she had ruled with the ideal of teaching her people to control their animalistic side, and to overcome their involuntary changes under duress. Through her teachings, she succeeded in drastically changing their culture, creating a peaceful and sophisticated society that could be a welcome addition to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Circa [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],''[[Star Wars Annual 2011]]'' the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], in their war against the Republic, sought to conquer Felacat. With their buildings in ruins, the [[Royal Felacatian Palace]] came under siege, and Prrt could do little but watch from above as her [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] sought to turn back the waves of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] thrown against her. For over six [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]], the CIS attacked the Felacatians with droids and [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]]. Queen Prrt requested help from the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] time and time again, but they received nothing but platitudes for their efforts. With resources stretched thin [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] over, the Senate was only able to dispatch the [[Togruta/Legends|Togruta]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]], to assist Prrt and her people. Tano and her [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]], [[R7-A7/Legends|R7-A7]], navigated her [[Delta-7B Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|starfighter]] around the battle and landed on a docking platform atop the palace. Tano was shocked to find the palace in such a state of damage, but when she rushed toward the guards, they ordered her to surrender rather than welcoming her assistance. [[File:Prrt_changes.png|thumb|left|250px|Prrt changes her form in order to fight]] Tano was taken to Prrt, who stood upon a high balcony, watching the battle in despair. The guards offered to execute Tano, but Prrt derided their intelligence, noting that she was clearly a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Tano told Prrt that she was there to evacuate the queen from the planet, but Prrt was disgusted by the idea, and told Tano that she should leave instead. She told the Padawan how their pleas had fallen on deaf ears, and now that they had managed to hold off the invaders for nearly a [[Standard month/Legends|month]], they had no need of Tano anymore. At that moment, however, the Separatist's [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] breached the main gateway of the palace, sending Prrt's soldiers fleeing in fear. [[File:Prrt_in_battle.png|thumb|250px|Prrt fights against the CIS droids]] Prrt declared that it was time for her to do her part, and while Tano believed this meant she would retreat as well, Prrt instead began to transform into her more aggressive form. Completing the changes, Tano questioned how she was able to transform at will, but Prrt charged into battle instead, with the Padawan trying to keep up. Prrt smashed into the attacking droids, breaking them apart with her [[Claw/Legends|claws]]. Her own soldiers were shocked to see her in her different form, and when Tano asked the queen why she was the only one to do so, she told Tano of how she'd trained her [[Species/Legends|species]] to subdue the beast within themselves. While tearing apart a tank, she told Tano that she had been wrong to trust the Republic when all she had done was weakened her people in the end. Tano sought to convince the queen that the Republic was still worth fighting for, and that they would never ask a peaceful people to change, but Prrt believed that with her palace fallen and her soldiers in retreat, the end for her civilization was at hand. As the pair felled a large pillar together, Prrt with her claws and Tano with her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]], the queen's guards halted their retreat and watched the ferocity that both women fought with. Prrt told Tano that she had been left alone by the Republic she believed in, but Tano in turn pointed out that she was not alone—she was fighting alongside Prrt. The pillar collapsed, crushing many droids beneath its weight, and Prrt realized that Tano was right. She apologized to the Padawan, but said that they would die together despite her misjudgement. Suddenly, the rest of the Felacatians transformed as well, inspired by the sight of their queen's bravery. They charged into the front lines, cutting apart the Separatist forces. The droids attempted to retreat, but the Felacatians gave pursuit and destroyed them. Later, atop the pillar they'd knocked down, Prrt stood swathed only in the flag of her people and spoke with Tano. Prrt thanked Tano for her help and told her that she would once more resume talks of alliance with the Republic, but that she had to find something besides the flag to wear first. ==Appearances== *{{Tales|8|Bad Business}} {{1st}} *{{TCWComicCite|6.21|The Feral Queen}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Miaria Prrt#legends |pl=Miaria Prrt |plFA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Prrt, Miaria}} [[Category:Felacatians]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Galactic Republic individuals]] [[Category:Queens]]
